title: Lamsa's Better Apple
description: A simple Resource Pack making Minecraft's apples look incredible.
body:
# Lamsa's Better Apple

- A simple and elegant resource pack that beautifies Minecraft's apples while perfectly preserving the game's original style.

- Perfect for players who want to add a touch of detailed artistry to their survival worlds or screenshot builds without straying from Minecraft's classic feel.

All feedback and suggestions are welcome for future updates.
